creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Tue Apr 26 03:33:15 UTC 2016
New revision: 414036
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/414036

Log:
  New port: net-mgmt/resource-agents

  These resource agents are used by two cluster resource management
  implementations:

  - Pacemaker
  - rgmanager

  More information about OCF resource agents is available in the OCF Resource
  Agent Developer's guide, in the doc/dev-guides subdirectory.

  WWW: http://www.linux-ha.org/wiki/Resource_agents

  PR:		209005
  Submitted by:	David Shane Holden <dpejesh@yahoo.com>

Changes:

  head/net-mgmt/resource-agents/
  head/net-mgmt/resource-agents/Makefile

  head/net-mgmt/resource-agents/files/patch-tools_ocf_tester.in

  head/net-mgmt/resource-agents/pkg-plist
